intents.text: Why does transform-messages.ts not filter out orphaned function_calls when thinkingSignature is missing after an abort?

intents.text: Don't drop tool results; keep them and add another API call with tool result after the tool call is removed by convertMessages.

intents.text: Dropping tool results would lobotomize codex when continuing sessions with tool calls from non-thinking models; find a smarter approach.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: we need a smarter way to do this

intents.text: Preserve tool result information for orphaned tool calls; a tool call in responses requires a corresponding thinking block.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: we need to preserve that information, otherwise we lobotomize

intents.text: Convert tool calls without thinking signatures to assistant output and tool results to user messages when no signature exists.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: convert the tool call to assistant output, and the tool result(s) to a user

intents.text: Revert the last change.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: revert your last change
